title: Antigravity Compiler
description: An experimental, type-safe compiler optimizing WebAssembly targets, written completely in Rust. Features advanced static analysis and dead-code elimination.

title: HydraKV
description: A lightweight distributed transactional key-value store in Go implementing Raft consensus for fault tolerance and linearizable reads.

title: SpectraRender
description: A high-fidelity neural rendering pipeline for generating 3D scenes from sparse photo inputs, leveraging customized NeRF architectures.
